metadata.description: CA New Grad RN Program Tracker

programs.city: Multiple (Sacramento, Oakland, San Jose, Santa Rosa, etc.)
programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required, must pass NCLEX before start. CA RN license by 7/19/2026.
programs.reputation_notes: Top-tier benefits, strong union (UNAC), excellent training. Highly competitive — one of the most sought-after new grad programs in CA.
programs.personal_notes: Cohort 2: app 3/29-3/31/2026 (3 DAYS ONLY), starts 7/27/2026. Must have CA RN license by 7/19/2026. Cohort 3: app 7/5-7/7/2026, starts 11/2/2026. INFO SESSIONS: March 9-13, 2026 (register on kaiserpermanentejobs.org). 21 participating NorCal hospitals. Apply via kaiserpermanentejobs.org.

programs.requirements: BSN required, BLS, must be eligible for CA RN license
programs.reputation_notes: Academic medical center, Magnet designated, excellent mentorship. Very competitive — UCLA name carries weight.
programs.personal_notes: App window: Mar 2-9, 2026 (5pm PT close). BSN/MSN required, grad Dec 2024-Jun 2026.

programs.requirements: ADN, BSN, or MSN accepted. Active CA RN license required before application. <9 months paid RN experience. Min 3.0 nursing GPA. BLS/ACLS required.
programs.pay_range: $48.50-51.50/hr (ADN $48.50, BSN $50, MSN $51.50) + shift differentials ($5/hr wknd, $7/hr M-Th nights, $9/hr F-Sun nights)
programs.reputation_notes: Top-ranked hospital nationally, Magnet status, strong research environment. Prestige and training quality are excellent. Now accepts ADN!
programs.personal_notes: App date: Jun 15, 2026 for Aug 24 cohort. ADN accepted. 3.0 GPA req. Contact: NewGradInfo@cshs.org

programs.requirements: ASN/ADN, BSN, or MSN accepted. Graduated within 18 months of cohort start. <6 months FT RN experience (~1040 hrs). CA RN license required. BLS + ACLS from AHA. No interim permits. No visa sponsorship.
programs.reputation_notes: World-class academic medical center, highest Bay Area pay, cutting-edge medicine. Extremely competitive. Now accepts ADN!
programs.personal_notes: DATES NOT YET RELEASED — Cohort 45 listed as "Coming Soon" on Stanford website (confirmed 2/18). Cohort 44: app was 10/20-10/26/2025 (7 DAYS ONLY), starts 3/16/2026. ESTIMATED Cohort 45: app ~late April/early May 2026 (5-7 day window), start ~September 2026. Bi-annual cohorts (Mar + Sep). INTERVIEW FORMAT: 5-6 person panel, behavioral + evidence-based questions. Stanford reads EVERY application manually (no keyword scanning). Contact: NewGradRN@stanfordhealthcare.org. Monitor careers page closely starting March 2026.

programs.requirements: ASN, BSN, or MSN accepted. Graduated within 18 months. Active CA RN license 4 weeks before start. <6 months RN experience. 2-year FT employment commitment.
programs.reputation_notes: Top nursing school affiliation, Magnet status, excellent research opportunities. One of the best in NorCal.
programs.personal_notes: PROGRAM PAUSED — confirmed still paused as of 2/18/2026. No Fall 2025, Spring 2026, or Summer 2026 cohort announced. NNRTP is the exclusive entry pathway for newly graduated RNs joining UCSF Health. 14-week intensive program (40 hrs/wk for first 8 weeks), 2-year employment commitment. Check tiny.ucsf.edu/NurseTrainingPrograms periodically for updates. Email NurseResidency@ucsf.edu.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required
programs.reputation_notes: Level 1 trauma center, only burn center in the region, academic environment. Great training, lower cost of living than Bay Area.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year. March + May 2026 cohorts: app window 11/5-11/12/2025 (CLOSED). ONE WEEK POSTING ONLY. Next cohort ~Aug 2026, apps expected Mar-Apr 2026 (1-week window). Apply via hr.ucdavis.edu/jobs/nursing/residency. FAQ at hr.ucdavis.edu/jobs/nursing/residency/faq. Contact: NewGradNurseResidency@health.ucdavis.edu.

programs.program_name: Transition into Practice (TIP) RN Residency Program
programs.city: Multiple (Burbank, Mission Hills, Tarzana, Santa Monica, Torrance)
programs.requirements: ADN, BSN, or MSN accepted. Graduated within last 12 months. Active CA RN license required before start.
programs.reputation_notes: Accepts ADN grads which is a major plus. Multiple locations. 8-16 week unit-based preceptorship. Good stepping stone.
programs.personal_notes: UNIFIED APPLICATION — one app covers ALL 6 SoCal campuses (St. Joseph Burbank, Holy Cross Mission Hills, Cedars-Sinai Tarzana, St. John's Santa Monica, Little Company of Mary Torrance + San Pedro). Pick 1st/2nd choice location at interview stage. Cohort starts 8/24/2026 — app date TBD. PATTERN: Aug 2025 apps opened 6/6/2025, closed 6/11/2025 (5 DAY WINDOW). Expect Aug 2026 apps ~early-mid June 2026 (5 days). Feb 2026 cohort closed. Also covers NorCal. Email campus@providence.org. Check providence.jobs/academy/ starting May 2026.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred. Graduated within 12-18 months. No previous acute care experience. BLS required. First 5-9 weeks Mon-Fri days with intermittent home study.
programs.reputation_notes: Easier to get into, accepts ADN. IMPORTANT: CA AG settled $1.53M against HCA for unlawful training repayment agreements (TRAPs). HCA no longer requires repayment contracts in CA since Spring 2023. Training quality inconsistent. Good fallback option.
programs.personal_notes: SEPARATE APPLICATIONS per hospital — each posts its own StaRN position. ACTIVE POSTINGS (as of 2/18): Los Robles July 2026 cohort (Job #12425587) — APPLY NOW. Riverside Community Hospital ED StaRN (Job #12176817). Riverside New Grad cohort (Job #10248621). CA HCA hospitals: Los Robles (Thousand Oaks), Riverside Community, Good Samaritan (San Jose), Regional Medical Center (San Jose). 10-16 weeks StaRN training then 12-month residency. NO repayment agreements in CA (settled $1.53M with CA AG). Must apply within 6 months of graduation or have <6 months experience. Apply via careers.hcahealthcare.com — search "StaRN" + hospital name.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required
programs.reputation_notes: Large NorCal system, good benefits, solid training. Multiple campuses give flexibility. Well-regarded regionally.
programs.personal_notes: SEPARATE POSTINGS per hospital — no centralized residency app. New grads auto-enrolled upon hire as Staff Nurse I. ACTIVE POSTINGS (as of 2/18): 136+ Staff Nurse I jobs on Indeed, 201 on LinkedIn. Confirmed active: ABSMC-Ashby (Berkeley) L&D posting valid through 3/2/2026 $71.79/hr, CPMC Van Ness (SF), Eden Medical Center (Castro Valley). Pay: ~$71-72/hr Bay Area. 88-hour program over 6 months. Small learning groups of ~8. Rolling postings — check jobs.sutterhealth.org frequently for Staff Nurse I / Clinical Nurse I openings. Keyword: "Staff Nurse I".

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Graduated within past 12 months. <6 months inpatient RN experience. 2 letters of reference (1 from nursing instructor). Unofficial transcripts.
programs.reputation_notes: Accepts ADN, locations statewide including smaller cities with less competition. Decent training, good work-life balance at smaller sites.
programs.personal_notes:
SEPARATE APPLICATIONS per hospital — must apply to each facility individually. APPS OPEN NOW — Summer 2026: apps opened 2/16/2026, cohort starts 7/20/2026. NO FIXED CLOSE DATE — closes when sufficient applications received (historically hours to days). APPLY ASAP.
CALIFORNIA LIVE POSTINGS (as of 2/18): Bakersfield Memorial Hospital (Jul 27 start) and Mercy Hospital of Bakersfield (Jul 27 start). Sacramento-area (Mercy General, Mercy San Juan, Methodist, Mercy Folsom, Woodland): AllNurses thread started 2/14 — postings may have briefly appeared and some interviews already scheduled. CHECK DAILY.
Fall 2026: apps open 6/22/2026, cohort starts 10/26/2026. ADN accepted (BSN preferred). NCLEX not required at app time but valid license needed 2 weeks before start.

programs.requirements: BSN required, BLS, PALS preferred. Versant model. ANCC accredited with distinction.
programs.reputation_notes: Top pediatric hospital nationally, incredible pediatric training. Versant model, ANCC accredited with distinction. Gold standard for peds in CA.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year: Spring (~Apr) and Fall (~Oct). April 2026 cohort: app 1/26 9am-1/28 12pm PST (2-DAY WINDOW, CLOSED). Start 4/27/2026. NOTE: Small March 2026 cohort exists (15-20 nurses, ICU/ED only, no Med-Surg). Fall 2026 cohort (~Oct): apps likely June/July 2026 (2-3 DAY WINDOW — extremely short). 75% precepted clinical / 25% simulation + classroom. 6-bed Las Madrinas Simulation Center. BSN required. Apply at jobs.chla.org/rn-residency.

programs.requirements: BSN required, BLS, eligible for CA RN license
programs.reputation_notes: Level 1 trauma center, academic environment, growing system. Slightly less competitive than UCLA/UCSF but great training.
programs.personal_notes: No separate residency application. Apply to Clinical Nurse I positions — auto-enrolled in residency upon hire. Summer 2026 cohort starts 8/24/2026, app window opens 6/15/2026. ADN and BSN accepted. Follow @ucirnrecruiter on Instagram for alerts. Check careers.ucihealth.org for CN1 postings.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Recent grad (<1 year experience). RN license required by designated deadline. Apply during last semester of nursing school. Clinical immersion with trained preceptors.
programs.reputation_notes: Less competitive, good for ADN grads. LA location with ~$53/hr avg pay. SEPARATE APPS per campus (see also Adventist Glendale, Roseville, Central CA entries).
programs.personal_notes: SEPARATE APPLICATION per campus. 2 COHORTS/YEAR: March and August. March 2026 may have already passed/is imminent. TARGET: August 2026 cohort — dates NOT yet posted. APPLICATION PROCESS: online app at adventisthealth.org → email prescreening questionnaire to WMMCRecruitment@ah.org → panel interview → individual manager interviews. REQUIREMENTS: 2 letters of reference (nursing instructor or former healthcare manager), essay on 5-year professional goals, must pass NCLEX before cohort start. CONTACT: WMMCRecruitment@ah.org to ask about August 2026 dates. Join Talent Community at adventisthealth.org/careers for alerts. AllNurses t769803.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required
programs.reputation_notes: Largest San Diego health system, Magnet status, great training and culture. Very desirable for San Diego area.
programs.personal_notes: App window: Mar 10-17, 2026 (external). Virtual forum Feb 23 @ 2:30pm. ~3 cohorts/year.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required. HireVue video interview (72-hr expiration).
programs.reputation_notes: Well-respected San Diego system, non-profit, good culture. Slightly less competitive than Sharp but equally good training.
programs.personal_notes:
THREE 2026 COHORTS:
• March 2026: external app 11/8-11/10/2025 (CLOSED), started 3/2/2026
• June 2026: external app 2/8-2/10/2026 (CLOSED), starts 6/1/2026. Program runs 6/1/2026-3/6/2027.
• October 2026: external app 6/21-6/23/2026 (3 DAYS ONLY). TARGET COHORT.
HireVue video interview required (72-hr expiration, 10 questions, self-paced). All dates subject to change. 2026 calendar PDF: careers.scripps.org/wp-content/uploads/sites/3487/2025/11/Calendar-2026-program-dates-for-Careers-Site-Home-Page-Link_Final_11.2025.pdf. Contact: developingtalent@scrippshealth.org.

programs.requirements: BSN required. Active CA RN license required. BLS + ACLS from AHA. <12 months RN experience. 1-year program + 2-year employment commitment. Video screening after app closes.
programs.reputation_notes: Seventh-day Adventist academic medical center, Level 1 trauma, strong NICU/Peds, nationally ranked. Good training, faith-based culture. Also has separate Children's Hospital residency.
programs.personal_notes: URGENT: Apps open Feb 23 - Mar 6, 2026 for Jun 8 cohort. Also Sep 15 cohort (apps Jun 1-12).

programs.requirements: BSN required. Min 3.0 nursing GPA. <1 year acute care RN experience. BLS + ACLS from AHA. 2-year commitment. Cover letter + personal statement (max 2 pages) + 2 letters of rec.
programs.reputation_notes: USC-affiliated academic medical center, Versant model, strong 1:1 preceptorship. Smaller cohorts = more personalized. 2-year commitment required.
programs.personal_notes: Spring 2026 starts 4/7 (app closed 1/12). Fall 2026 cohort ~Sep 2026. App window: 6/2-6/16/2026 (corrected from earlier estimate). Submit all docs as single PDF via USC Workday.

programs.requirements: Graduated from accredited nursing program within 18 months of start. <6 months acute care RN experience. BLS required.
programs.reputation_notes: Both Concord and Walnut Creek campuses are ANCC Magnet designated. 12-month Vizient/AACN program with monthly seminars. Good East Bay option.
programs.personal_notes: DATES NOT YET RELEASED — website only shows 2023 dates as of 2/18/2026. No 2026 dates posted. No allnurses 2026 thread yet. Both ADN and BSN eligible. Must graduate within 18 months of start, <6 months acute care RN experience, CA RN license by start. Need cover letter, resume, 2 letters of rec (clinical instructor + preceptor preferred). Historical pattern: May posting, Aug start. Set up job alerts on career site. Contact: human.resources@johnmuirhealth.com or 925-947-5215.

programs.requirements: BSN required (ADN must enroll in BSN within 1 year of hire, complete within 2 years). Active CA RN license. BLS required. 1-year FT commitment.
programs.reputation_notes: Highly regarded Orange County community hospital. Beautiful Newport Beach campus. Benner 'Novice to Expert' model. Rolling cohorts monthly. Good culture.
programs.personal_notes: Rolling cohorts starting end of each month. No set application window. ACTIVE POSTINGS (as of 2/18): Clinical Nurse I - Medical 8th Floor Oncology (Newport Beach, posted ~2/12), Clinical Nurse I - Birthing Suites LDRP (Irvine). IMPORTANT: Not all "Clinical Nurse I" postings are new-grad eligible — some require 1 year experience. Read each posting carefully. BSN required (ADN must enroll in BSN within 1 year). Salary: $43.41-$70.63/hr. Search "Clinical Nurse I" at jobs.hoag.org/search weekly. 12-month Vizient/AACN program.

programs.program_name: New Grad RN Transition to Practice Program
programs.requirements: CA RN license by cohort start. BLS from AHA. 1 letter of rec from clinical instructor. Indicate top 2 specialty tracks.
programs.reputation_notes: Top children's hospital nationally, U.S. News ranked in 7 specialties. Outstanding pediatric training. Best peds option in San Diego.
programs.personal_notes: App window 2/9-2/13 CLOSED. Next cohort likely Spring 2027.

programs.requirements: New grad RN. BLS required. Free ACLS/PALS/NRP certifications during program.
programs.reputation_notes: Largest healthcare system in Central Valley, includes Community Regional (Level 1 Trauma). Lower cost of living. Free additional certifications. Less competitive.
programs.personal_notes: ~3 cohorts/year. No separate residency application — new grads auto-enter residency upon hire. ACTIVE: 65+ new grad RN jobs on Glassdoor for Fresno area. Up to $25K signing bonus advertised for some RN positions. Part-time "New Nurse" preparation roles available (includes RN Residency courses + free ACLS/PALS/NRP). 13 didactic workshops over 1 year + 8 weeks (24 shifts) precepted orientation. Apply at jobs.communityhealthsystem.org/nursing/new-nurses/. Rolling postings — no fixed app windows.

programs.requirements: Active CA RN license. Current BLS. Must initially work night shift (3-year waitlist for days). ADN or BSN accepted.
programs.pay_range: $48/hr avg starting (county pay scale, county benefits; Glassdoor reports higher total comp)
programs.reputation_notes: Massive county hospital, Level 1 trauma center, incredible patient volume and acuity. Unmatched clinical experience. County benefits (pension, health). Great resume builder.
programs.personal_notes: NOT A FORMAL RESIDENCY -- rolling hire process. ACTIVE POSTING: RN I position opened 2/17/2026 on governmentjobs.com/careers/lacounty (search "Registered Nurse I"). APPLY NOW. Email LAC_USC_NursingRecruitment@dhs.lacounty.gov with copy of RN license (or DCA license lookup screenshot), then call (323) 409-4663. Recruiters respond within 2-3 business days. Recruiters: Zeena George (zgeorge@dhs.lacounty.gov), Rachel Blankenship (rblankenship@dhs.lacounty.gov). Rolling classes every 2-4 months. ~9-week program (6 wks: 3 days class + 2 days clinical, then preceptorship). All new hires start nights ($38/hr base, no differential). 3-year waitlist for dayshift. County process: Personality exam (no math/nursing questions), LiveScan + health clearance (~2-3 months processing). Separate from Keck USC (private system).

programs.requirements: Valid permanent/temporary CA RN license (interim permit OK). No BSN/ADN requirement specified. Include license number on application. Apply via careers.sf.gov (SmartRecruiters).
programs.pay_range: $71.96-95.86/hr ($164,840-$230,698/yr; depends on verified experience up to 21 years)
programs.reputation_notes: Level 1 trauma center, UCSF-affiliated teaching hospital. SF city pay scale (among highest in state). 85,000 ED patients/year. Outstanding trauma and critical care exposure. 7 specialty training tracks.
programs.personal_notes: CONTINUOUS RECRUITMENT via careers.sf.gov (SmartRecruiters). Current posting: 2320 Training Program (role id 3743990005889491) opened 6/12/2025. ELIGIBLE LIST MAY BE EXPIRING — prior eligible lists last max 6 months. New 2026 posting expected but not yet confirmed. Also new experienced nurse posting opened 2/2/2026. Applying to one 2320 posting auto-considers you for ALL 7 specialty training areas (ED, Critical Care, Perinatal, Neonatal, Med-Surg/Periop/Psych). Salary: $164,840-$230,698/yr ($71.96-$95.86/hr). Interim RN permit OK. No BSN required. Contact: Katrina Navarro katrina.navarro@sfdph.org (628) 271-6717.

programs.requirements: Graduated within 18 months. Active CA RN license. 3 letters of rec (2+ from nursing instructors). Final transcript. AHA BLS.
programs.reputation_notes: ANCC Magnet designated (4th designation). Accredited with distinction for Practice Transition. 400-hour intensive clinical program. Among highest Bay Area pay.
programs.personal_notes: Spring 2026 cohort starts 3/30/2026 (CA RN license needed by 2/5 — NOT viable for May NCLEX taker). TARGET: Sep 2026 cohort starts 9/28/2026. Apps expected May-June 2026 (pattern: early summer for Sep cohort). $83.20/hr confirmed. ADN accepted. 400-hour intensive clinical (320 hrs with dedicated preceptors) + quarterly professional development days. ANCC accredited with distinction. Specialties: Med-Surg, Onc, Tele, Tele-Stroke, Float, L&D, ED. Apply via careers.elcaminohealth.org.

programs.requirements: Newly licensed RN or <12 months RN experience. Apply no more than 2 months before graduation. Monthly didactic classes for 12 months.
programs.reputation_notes: U.S. News ranked in 7 specialties. Only freestanding children's hospital between LA and SF. Excellent pediatric training. Lower cost of living.
programs.personal_notes: Cohorts quarterly: January, April, July, October. July 2026 cohort confirmed. Apply for RN I positions on jobs.valleychildrens.org — postings expected May-Jun 2026 (apply no more than 2 months before graduation). Monthly classes for 12 months. Only freestanding children's hospital between LA and SF. Relocation assistance $1,500-4,500 if 100+ miles away.

programs.requirements: Active CA RN license 1 week before start (no interim permits). AHA BLS required. New grads and nurses with limited acute care experience. ANCC PTAP accredited.
programs.reputation_notes: Well-respected Santa Barbara community hospital system. Beautiful location. 8-month program (classroom + simulation + clinical preceptorship). ANCC PTAP accredited. Less competitive than LA/SD programs.
programs.personal_notes: 4 COHORTS IN 2026: Feb 23 (started), May 18 (TARGET — app 2/12-2/22 MIDNIGHT, 4 DAYS LEFT), ~Aug 2026, ~Nov 2026. ALSO: Cohort 41 starts 6/29/2026 (separate posting found). May 2026 app window: 2/12-2/22 (10 DAYS). Info session was 2/3/2026 at 3pm PST. 8-month program: classroom + simulation + clinical preceptorship. Locations: Santa Barbara Cottage Hospital, Goleta Valley Cottage Hospital, Cottage Rehabilitation Hospital. CA RN license must be active 1 week before start (no interim permits). For Aug/Nov 2026 cohorts, expect app windows ~2-3 months before start. Check cottagehealth.org/nursing/residency/.

programs.program_name: Coeta & Donald Barker Foundation Nurse Residency
programs.requirements: New graduate RN. Paired with dedicated recruitment specialist. In-person or Zoom interviews. Pick top 3 specialty preferences.
programs.reputation_notes: Desert community hospital in Coachella Valley. Named residency program (Barker Foundation). Good for those wanting SoCal without LA/SD competition. Lower cost of living.
programs.personal_notes: Rolling/unit-based model — units open and close independently. 4 North (Tele/Ortho) oversubscribed, no longer accepting. Additional unit cohort deadlines 'will be posted as they become available.' Historical pattern: ~quarterly starts (Feb, May, Jul, Sep). 11 units available. Contact: erose@eisenhowerhealth.org / 760-285-2996. Bookmark careers.eisenhowerhealth.org/careers/new-grad-positions/ and check regularly.

programs.requirements: Must complete NCLEX by 2/1/2026 for current cycle. Online application only. Apps close when capacity reached.
programs.reputation_notes: San Bernardino County hospital. Level II trauma, great patient volume/acuity. Accepts ADN. 7-month program with Winter/Spring/Summer cohorts. Good stepping stone.
programs.personal_notes: Spring 2026 cohort starts April 2026 (app 1/10-1/23/2026, CLOSED). NCLEX must be completed by 2/1 for current cycle. Apps only accepted online during window or until capacity reached (may close early). Summer 2026 cohort expected ~July 2026 (apps likely April/May 2026). 3 cohorts/year: Winter, Spring, Summer. Hybrid curriculum: classroom + clinical. Contact Jennifer Walker, Program Coordinator: 909-580-1200, WalkerJen@armc.sbcounty.gov. Monitor governmentjobs.com/careers/sanbernardino for postings.

programs.hospital: MemorialCare Long Beach Medical Center / Miller Children's
programs.requirements: BSN required. Can apply pending NCLEX (need RN# before cohort start). 5-day posting windows only.
programs.reputation_notes: Large SoCal system. Good training, year-long program. Miller Children's is excellent for peds. SEPARATE APPS by campus — Long Beach posts in JANUARY, Orange Coast/Saddleback post in FEBRUARY.
programs.personal_notes: Aug cohort apps post in JUNE for only 5 DAYS. BSN req at LB. Act fast. Contact: mhsrnnewgraduates@memorialcare.org

programs.requirements: CA RN license by program start. Resume, cover letter, 2 recommendation letters on official letterhead with signatures, headshot photo. Apply ASAP — positions may close based on volume.
programs.reputation_notes: San Diego County system. North SD County option (less competitive than Sharp/Scripps). Good for SD area without downtown competition.
programs.personal_notes: 3 cohorts/year: Spring (Feb), Summer (Aug), Fall (Oct). Summer 2026 cohort starts ~Aug 2026, apps expected June 2026 (confirmed on official site). Interview period July 2026. 12-month program: Phase 1 (12-16 wks supervised bedside + classroom), Phase 2 (independent + mentorship). Escondido units: CV, ED, ICU, L&D, Med-Surg Tele, Neuro, Surg/Trauma ICU, Ortho. Poway units: ED, Med-Surg Tele, Critical Care. Apply via PalomarHealth.org/Careers (Jobvite).

programs.requirements: Newly graduated RN, <1 year experience. Valid CA RN license at time of application. Personal statement (max 2 pages). 2-year FT employment commitment.
programs.reputation_notes: Cedars-Sinai affiliate in Pasadena. 3 cohorts in 2026. Centralized onboarding + department-specific training. Good LA-area option without downtown traffic.
programs.personal_notes: 3 cohorts in 2026: Winter ~Jan 20 (passed), Spring ~May 12, Fall ~Aug 18. Fall 2026 cohort app window expected ~June 2026. BSN or MSN required. Personal statement (max 2 pages) + 2-year FT commitment. Monitor hhcareers.com starting May/June for Fall cohort posting.

programs.city: Multiple (Los Angeles, Orange County, San Diego, Inland Empire)
programs.requirements: BSN preferred, BLS required, must pass NCLEX before start. CA RN license by 7/17/2026.
programs.reputation_notes: Top-tier benefits, strong union (UNAC), excellent training. Highly competitive — one of the most sought-after new grad programs in CA.
programs.personal_notes:
THREE 2026 COHORTS:
• Cohort 1 (Mar 30): CLOSED. External apps 11/14-11/16/2025.
• Cohort 2 (Aug 17 — TARGET): External apps 4/24-4/26/2026 (3 DAYS ONLY). CA RN license by 7/17. INFO SESSIONS: 4/1 (4pm PT), 4/9 (12pm PT), 4/14 (2pm PT).
• Cohort 3 (Nov 8): External apps 8/9-8/11/2026. CA RN license by 9/29. INFO SESSIONS: 7/16 (3pm PT), 7/21 (2pm PT), 7/29 (12pm PT).
Both Cohort 2 and 3 viable for May 2026 NCLEX taker. Cohort 2 app window (4/24-4/26) is BEFORE NCLEX but license deadline is 7/17 — apply first, pass NCLEX after. Apply via kaiserpermanentejobs.org.

programs.requirements: BSN required. Active CA RN license. BLS required. Vizient/AACN model.
programs.reputation_notes: Top academic medical center, U.S. News nationally ranked. Level 1 trauma. Rapidly expanding (new Hillcrest campus). Outstanding training and research.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year: March and September. March 2026 cohort apps opened 10/22/2025 (5 months before start). Sep 2026 cohort apps expected ~April 2026 (based on 5-month-ahead pattern). Apply for Clinical Nurse I positions at employment.ucsd.edu/nursing. Vizient/AACN residency auto-enrolled upon hire. Watch employment.ucsd.edu/new-grad for postings.

programs.requirements: BSN or MSN from ACEN/CCNE-accredited program. Degree conferral 6/1/2025-6/30/2026. Min 3.5 cumulative GPA. No paid RN experience at program start. CA RN license verified by 8/11/2026. BLS + PALS.
programs.reputation_notes: U.S. News top 10 children's hospital nationally. Stanford-affiliated. Highest pay in Bay Area. World-class pediatric training. Extremely competitive.
programs.personal_notes: Info webinar: Feb 25, 2026 @ 5pm PST. Apps Mar 6-13. BSN req, 3.5 GPA. 2 rec letters + 250-word essay.

programs.requirements: Graduation from accredited RN program. BSN required within 2 years of completing residency. Active CA RN license. BLS + PALS preferred. ANCC PTAP accredited.
programs.reputation_notes: U.S. News ranked children's hospital. Only dedicated pediatric hospital in Orange County. Excellent pediatric training. Very competitive. ANCC PTAP accredited. 16-month program.
programs.personal_notes: 16-MONTH PROGRAM (not 12). Aug 2026 cohort apps expected mid-May 2026 (3-DAY WINDOW). CONFIRMED PATTERN: 2025 Aug cohort apps were 5/16-5/19 (3 days). Feb 2026 cohort apps were 10/17-10/20/2025. Must have CA RN license 2 weeks before start. BSN required within 2 years of residency completion. Apply at choc.org/careers (positions listed among job openings). ANCC PTAP accredited.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. New grad or <1 year experience. Active CA RN license 2 weeks before cohort start. BLS from AHA. Can apply before getting license.
programs.reputation_notes: Community hospital in SGV/LA area. Accepts ADN. ANCC PTAP accredited. ~25-30 nurses per cohort. Less competitive. Good stepping stone. SEPARATE APPS per campus (see also PIH Downey and PIH Good Samaritan).
programs.personal_notes:
3 UPCOMING COHORTS WITH CONFIRMED DATES:
• May 18, 2026: app opens 3/9, closes 3/27 (19 DAYS AWAY)
• Aug 10, 2026: app opens 6/1, closes 6/19
• Oct 19, 2026: app opens 8/10, closes 8/28
Current cohort started 2/23/2026. ~25-30 nurses per cohort. Apply via jobs.pihhealth.org (search "New Grad Whittier"). RN license needed 2 weeks before start but can apply without it. ANCC PTAP accredited. ADN accepted.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred. Active CA RN license. BLS required.
programs.reputation_notes: Well-regarded South Bay community hospital. Cedars-Sinai affiliate. Good training, less competitive than academic centers.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year: Spring (early Mar) and Fall (early Sep). Fall 2026 cohort: apps typically open June/July 2026 for 1-2 WEEKS ONLY (closes based on volume). APPLICATION REQUIRES: Resume, degree, official transcripts, certifications/RN license info, 1-2 letters of recommendation, cover letter. Can apply WITHOUT RN license — must have it by start date. 12-month program: 18 weeks 1:1 precepted (transition to nights ~weeks 9-10). QSEN competencies framework. Cedars-Sinai affiliate. Allnurses thread t770310. Watch torrancememorial.org/about-us/nursing/new-graduate-nursing-residency/.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. New grad or <6 months RN experience. Versant model.
programs.reputation_notes: Inland Empire community hospital. Versant model. Accepts ADN. ANCC accredited with distinction. Less competitive. Good for getting started in nursing.
programs.personal_notes: PROGRAM CONFIRMED — ANCC PTAP accredited, Versant model. Spring 2026 starts 3/23 (app was 1/5-1/12/2026, CLOSED). Fall 2026 cohort expected ~Sep 2026, apps likely Jun/Jul 2026. Apply for 'Clin 1' positions (Requirement #18844). Contact: Shane Alday (909) 469-9490 x7107. Check pvhmc.org/careers-residency/residency-programs/rn-residency-program/how-to-apply/.

programs.hospital: City of Hope National Medical Center
programs.requirements: BSN required prior to start. Active CA RN license. Current BLS + ACLS from AHA. 0-1 year experience. PCT experience preferred. Cover letter, resume, certifications, 2 letters of recommendation (5-doc upload limit).
programs.reputation_notes: NCI-designated comprehensive cancer center. World-class oncology/BMT training. Unique specialty focus. Magnet designated. ANCC PTAP accredited with distinction.
programs.personal_notes: Alan & Marlene Norton Nurse Residency Program. 2 cohorts/year: March and September (~35 new grads per cohort). CORRECTED PATTERN: Sep 2024 AllNurses thread started 6/4/2024 — apps open early-to-mid JUNE (not August). Apps open ~June 1, close ~June 28 (estimated from Sep 2024 pattern). March cohort apps open ~January. REQUIREMENTS: BSN required, BLS + ACLS, cover letter, resume, 2 letters of recommendation (5-doc upload limit on portal). Choose 2 unit preferences. Includes ONS supplemental coursework (cancer patient care). Apply via cityofhopejobs.org (search 'Clinical Nurse I' or 'New Grad'). AllNurses threads: t760115 (Sep 2024), t763753 (Mar 2025).

programs.hospital: VA Greater Los Angeles Healthcare System
programs.requirements: US citizen required. BSN required for PB-RNR program. Active CA RN license. Must pass federal background check.
programs.pay_range: ~$62K/yr stipend (PB-RNR) or regular GS nurse pay ~$55-70/hr (TTP)
programs.reputation_notes: Federal benefits (pension, health, education). Largest VA in US. Unique patient population (veterans). No malpractice insurance needed. Student loan repayment options.
programs.personal_notes: Apps Apr 1-7 ONLY (7 days, 200 applicant cap). BSN req. CCNE-accredited. US citizen req.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Active CA RN license. BLS required. County employee benefits.
programs.reputation_notes: Level 1 trauma center, only burn center in South Bay. County hospital — excellent benefits and pension. High acuity. Accepts ADN.
programs.personal_notes: ROLLING POSTINGS — no centralized residency app. Apply for Clinical Nurse I positions via governmentjobs.com/careers/santaclara. CURRENTLY OPEN (as of 2/18): CN1 Critical Care (multiple ICUs at VMC, O'Connor, Saint Louise Regional), CN1 L&D, CN1 ED, CN1 Unclassified (Specialty Training Programs). Feb Transfer recruitment: 2/1-2/13/2026. Need supplemental questionnaire + 2 Nursing Reference Request forms. ADN accepted (interim permit OK). County pension + excellent benefits. Level 1 trauma + only burn center in South Bay. Set up Job Interest Notifications on governmentjobs.com. AllNurses thread: allnurses.com/scvmc-new-grad-clinical-nurse-t763114.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. New grad or <6 months RN experience.
programs.reputation_notes: SGV community hospital system. 5 cohorts/year. Accepts ADN. Less competitive, good for getting foot in the door. 3 hospital campuses.
programs.personal_notes: YEAR-ROUND ACCEPTANCE — 5 cohorts/year. ACTIVE POSTINGS (as of 2/18, all posted 2/12/2026): R.N. II DOU Days & Nights (QVH), R.N. II Mother Baby Days & Nights (QVH), R.N. II NICU Days (QVH), R.N. II Emergency Nights (QVH), R.N. II DOU Days (FPH), R.N. II DOU Nights (ICH). PAY: $48.97-$74.88/hr. IMPORTANT: Apply to R.N. II postings (not R.N. I — naming is counterintuitive). 8-week MAP RN Residency. 3 hospitals: Queen of the Valley/QVH (West Covina), Inter-Community/ICH (Covina), Foothill Presbyterian/FPH (Glendora). Apply at jobs.emanatehealth.org. FRAUD WARNING: Verify postings through HR 626.858.8515.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Active CA RN license. County employee.
programs.reputation_notes: Riverside County hospital. County benefits and pension. Accepts ADN. Less competitive. Good patient volume.
programs.personal_notes: 2025 postings closed May 18, 2025 (ED: 18-wk residency, ACCU: 16-wk, Peds: 8-wk). VERY NARROW 4-5 DAY APP WINDOWS on governmentjobs.com. 2026 new grad windows expected May-Jun 2026 for summer cohort starts. Check governmentjobs.com/careers/riverside/ruhsjobs frequently starting April 2026. CA RN license not required to interview but needed for onboarding. County benefits/pension.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. New grad RN. Must apply, interview, and be hired into a home department first.
programs.reputation_notes: Largest hospital in Tulare County. Rural/semi-urban setting. Lower cost of living. Accepts ADN. Less competitive. 6-month program (didactic + clinical).
programs.personal_notes: 6-month program. Rolling year-round hiring — apply, interview, get hired into home department first, then start residency. Spring 2026 residency app deadline was 11/21/2025 (PASSED). 156 open positions on Workday portal (as of 2/18). Apply at KaweahHealth.org/Careers (Workday). Contact: NurseRecruitment@KaweahHealth.org or (559) 624-2274 — EMAIL TO ASK about next residency start date for Summer/Fall 2026. Central Valley — lower cost of living, less competition.

programs.requirements: BSN or higher required. Active CA RN license. BLS required.
programs.reputation_notes: Community hospital in East Bay/South Bay. Good Bay Area pay. Less competitive than Stanford/UCSF. Very small cohorts (~7 RNs). 6-month program.
programs.personal_notes: BSN REQUIRED (ADN accepted if currently enrolled in BSN program). Feb 2026 cohort started (7-9 RNs selected). Very small cohorts. 6-month program: up to 40 hrs/wk, 8hr and 12hr shifts (days/eves/nights). After completion: transferred to Med-Surg unit at 0.9 FTE, 12-hour shifts. $84.54/hr confirmed. Next cohort likely ~Aug-Sep 2026 (estimated, based on ~6 month cycle). Watch whhs.com/careers and jobs.jobvite.com/washingtonhospital for postings.

programs.requirements: ADN, BSN, or MSN accepted. <6 months acute care experience. Active CA RN license before start. AHA BLS. Min 2 letters of recommendation. Resume with clinical rotation details.
programs.reputation_notes: Solano County community hospital. Between Bay Area and Sacramento. Good pay, lower cost of living than SF. Year-long program with monthly education sessions + EBP project.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year: Spring and Fall. No 2026 dates published yet — program only accepts applications when position is actively posted. INTERNAL APPLICANTS PRIORITIZED. ADN/BSN/MSN all accepted. Watch NorthBay Oracle careers portal: erou.fa.us2.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/CX_1. Fall 2026 posting likely ~June-July 2026. AllNurses: allnurses.com/northbay-medical-center-new-grad-t766332.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Active CA RN license. County employee.
programs.reputation_notes: Kern County teaching hospital. Level II trauma. Accepts ADN. County benefits. Vizient/AACN accredited program. Less competitive, high need area.
programs.personal_notes: Vizient/AACN accredited nurse residency. Year-long program. APPEARS CONTINUOUS/ROLLING recruitment (no strict cohort windows). Must graduate within 90 days of hire. New hire premium: +6% above base pay. Apply via kernmedical.com/careers (search "Registered Nurse"). DIRECT CONTACTS: Elizabeth Oseguera elizabeth.oseguera@kernmedical.com, Staff Development staffdevelopment@kernmedical.com or (661) 326-2646. EMAIL TO ASK about current openings and 2026 start dates. County benefits/pension. Level II trauma. Bakersfield — lowest cost of living.

programs.requirements: Graduation from accredited nursing program. ADN or BSN accepted. <12 months RN experience.
programs.reputation_notes: Inland Empire community hospital. Accepts ADN. 2 cohorts/year (Feb and Aug). Less competitive.
programs.personal_notes: 2 cohorts/year: February and August. Spring 2026 app opened 1/12/2026 (NCLEX must be scheduled by 1/31 — CLOSED). Aug 2026 cohort apps expected ~May-Jun 2026 — closes when max apps received. 48+ hrs didactic + 300-1,000 hrs preceptorship. Apply via redlandshospital.hcshiring.com. Contact: CTorre@redlandshospital.org or 909.335.5678.

programs.requirements: New grad RN. Active CA RN license.
programs.reputation_notes: USC-affiliated community hospital. Formerly Methodist Hospital. 2 cohorts/year (April and September). Paid residency with full-time hire.
programs.personal_notes: Program now under Keck Medicine of USC umbrella. 2 cohorts/year: April and September. Spring 2026 starts 4/7 (app closed 1/12). Sep 2026 cohort apps expected June/July 2026. Apply via usccareers.usc.edu — search 'Staff RN - New Graduate'. Arcadia is one of four Keck facilities. BSN required, 3.0 GPA minimum.

programs.requirements: Nursing students within 3 months of graduation or recent grads. ADN or BSN accepted. County employee.
programs.reputation_notes: County hospital. Accepts ADN. Can apply before graduation. County benefits/pension. Less competitive.
programs.personal_notes: Summer 2026 cohort confirmed — app period closed (apps were 10/13-10/27/2025). JOIN WAITLIST NOW at nursingeducation.venturacounty.gov/rn-residency-program-waitlist/. Includes VCMC, Santa Paula Hospital, and Inpatient Psychiatric Unit. RN I: $44.58-46.85/hr, RN II: $52.07-69.62/hr. County benefits/pension. Contact: vcmc.nursinged@ventura.org / 805-652-6045. Next application cycle TBD.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred; enrollment in BSN program required (Magnet). Can apply pending NCLEX (need RN# before cohort start). 5-day posting windows only.
programs.reputation_notes: MemorialCare system — Magnet designated. SEPARATE APPLICATION from Long Beach/Miller Children's. Orange Coast posts in FEBRUARY (Long Beach posts in January).
programs.personal_notes: CONFIRMED COHORT SCHEDULE: 3 cohorts/year — March (apps in Feb), August (apps in June), November (apps in Sep). March 2026 cohort: CLOSED. AUGUST 2026 cohort (TARGET): positions posted in JUNE 2026 for 5 DAYS ONLY. Nov 2026 cohort: positions posted in SEPTEMBER 2026. BSN preferred but must be enrolled in BSN program (Magnet). Positions posted per unit (search "New Grad" in title). Watch careers.memorialcare.org/recent-grads daily starting June 1. Contact Ashley: mhsrnnewgraduates@memorialcare.org.

programs.requirements: BSN preferred; enrollment in BSN program required (Magnet). Can apply pending NCLEX (need RN# before cohort start). 5-day posting windows only.

programs.personal_notes: CONFIRMED COHORT SCHEDULE: 3 cohorts/year — March (apps in Feb), August (apps in June), November (apps in Sep). March 2026 cohort: CLOSED. AUGUST 2026 cohort (TARGET): positions posted in JUNE 2026 for 5 DAYS ONLY. Nov 2026 cohort: positions posted in SEPTEMBER 2026. BSN preferred but must be enrolled in BSN program (Magnet). Positions posted per unit (search "New Grad" in title). Watch careers.memorialcare.org/recent-grads daily starting June 1. Contact Ashley: mhsrnnewgraduates@memorialcare.org.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. New grad or <1 year experience. Active CA RN license 2 weeks before cohort start. BLS from AHA. Can apply before getting license.

programs.requirements: ADN or BSN accepted. Recent grad (<1 year experience). RN license required by designated deadline. Apply during last semester of nursing school.
